name: Danish Flatbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind oats in a blender or food processor until crumbly.
2. Measure all ingredients into a large bowl. Mix together well to form stiff dough. Let rest for 20 minutes.
3. Divide the dough into 4 equal ball-shaped pieces. Roll each piece on lightly floured surface as thin as possible.
4. Fry the rolls in a hot, greased skillet at 350°F (175°C). Turn them to cook the other side until brown spots appear, about 2-3 minutes total.
- Alternatively, the rolls can be baked in an oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 9 minutes, shaped as sheets.
5. Serve hot or cold with butter and your choice of jams or honey.
Yield: 4 flatbreads
